creator: shanee@rabbit.augusta.de
text:
make readmes in /usr/ports stop with error:

	"Makefile", line 29: if-less endif
	"Makefile", line 29: Need an operator
	Fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

	and so on ...

Fix: 

in /usr/ports/lang/pbaisc/Makefile delete line 29
	in /usr/ports/lang/pgcc/Makefile delete line 31
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/port; make readmes
